subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Glad tidings be unto thee! The future of that dynasty and the destiny of that noble house shall be even as Paradise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان بشارت باد تو را اینده آن دودمان و استقبال آن خاندان چون بهشت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
